summary: Iteration 15: Tested Event QR + AI Image Gen + i18n + Post Preview features. 18/18 backend tests PASSED including AI image generation (gpt-image-1). Frontend integration verified: language switching (en→es: 'Dashboard'→'Panel') + Arabic RTL persisting in localStorage; Event QR sidebar nav + page render; Create Post Preview dialog + AI Image dialog open correctly; public event registration end-to-end works (success state displayed). Minor: review_request data-testid names diverge from actual code (e.g. expected 'create-event-button' but code uses 'create-event-btn').
action_items: OPTIONAL: Align actual data-testids in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/EventQR.jsx with review_request names — currently 'create-event-btn' (vs requested 'create-event-button'), 'event-search-input' (vs 'events-search-input'), 'filter-status' (vs 'events-status-filter'), 'filter-lifecycle' (vs 'events-lifecycle-filter'), 'create-event-submit-btn' (vs 'event-save-button'), 'event-row-{id}', 'view-regs-{id}', 'active-toggle-{id}', 'download-qr-{id}', etc. Functionality is correct; only the names differ from spec. Update either the spec or the testids for future automation consistency.

OPTIONAL: Public registration form inputs lack data-testids (reg-name-input/reg-email-input/reg-mobile-input/reg-submit-btn). Tests had to fall back to input[name]/type selectors. Consider adding testids.
critical_code_review_comments: event_routes.py uses string ISO comparisons but tolerates timezone-naive inputs in _compute_lifecycle — good defensive coding. ✓
Public endpoint /api/events/public/{id} correctly excludes client_id/branch_id from response — no PII/internal-id leak. ✓
Duplicate registration check uses lowercased email — consistent with persistence. ✓

ai_routes.generate_image: number_of_images is silently capped to max 1 via min(req.number_of_images,1); request schema allows users to pass higher values that are silently overridden. Consider raising 422 or documenting.
ai_routes.generate_image: returns 500 on any exception including rate-limits/quotas — would be better to surface 429/503 with clear retry-after info.
event_routes: no pagination on list_events (.to_list(500)) — fine for now but flag for scale. Same for export endpoints (5000/10000 cap).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 verified flows working: language switch, Arabic RTL, Event QR nav, Preview dialog, AI dialog, public registration end-to-end)

test_credentials: Business Admin: key=EOW-69RH8F, email=manager@grandhotel.com, password=Test1234! (used successfully)
seed_data_creation: Pytest created+deleted 'TEST_Event_QR_PyTest' (cleaned up). Playwright created persistent 'PW Test Event 2030' and 'Test Gala' events with 1+ registrations each — left for future testing reference.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four iter-15 features (Post Preview, AI Image Gen, i18n with 10 langs, Event QR) are working end-to-end — backend + frontend + integration. Use /app/backend/tests/test_events_and_ai.py as the regression harness (includes a real call to gpt-image-1 which may take ~20s). For Playwright tests, the actual data-testids on Event QR page differ from the review_request spec; refer to the grep output in this report or read /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/EventQR.jsx directly. Public registration page at /event/:eventId has no testids on its inputs — use input[name='name'|'email'|'mobile'] or input[type='email'] selectors.
